headline: Venezuela circulates draft of new oil law regulations for companies
summary: Investing.com -- The Venezuelan government is circulating a draft of comprehensive regulations as part of its newly enacted hydrocarbons law, establishing highly anticipated operational boundaries for private corporations looking to invest in the country’s energy sector.
